default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, article progress, and website launch.](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [17 articles ready by end of week: 6 to publish, 5 in editing, 6 more incoming](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Prioritizing high-intent content and industry-specific topics for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Starting refresh strategy for existing content ranking on pages 2-4](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Website launch planned for Friday; GrowthX team available for support](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Prioritization

  - [Current queue: 6 articles ready to publish, 5 in editing, 6 more by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Jessica emphasized prioritizing high-intent and industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [New prioritization system: Adding a column in Airtable for easier tracking](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Balancing immediate lead generation with long-term SEO growth (3-6 month horizon)](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Focusing on keywords ranking on pages 2-4](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Three approaches: expansion, wholesale refresh, and consolidation](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Starting with content expansion workflow, measuring in cohorts using SEO testing tool](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Identified "text offline" page as high-priority for new content (high search volume, high intent)](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### Website Launch

  - [Scheduled for Friday](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Content transferred, final review in progress](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Plan to onboard Sadira to Prismic CMS post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### Content Quality Feedback

  - [Improving on industry focus (manufacturing, construction prioritized over retail, hospitality)](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Adjusting terminology (e.g., "production goals" instead of "sales goals" for non-desk industries)](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Adding UTM-tracked CTAs (e.g., "contact sales," "schedule demo," "try for free")](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

### CTA Discussion

  - [Balancing CTA inclusion without appearing too salesy](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Focus on keeping visitors engaged and providing value, which can indirectly lead to conversions](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Consider using contextual next steps instead of always pushing for demos](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prioritize creating new content for the "text offline" page](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Continue working on website launch for Friday](https://fathom.video/share/KGsWGKqwqSY6iS-kNTLLHCUCbH_53JCW?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
